name: Gladiator Beast Gistel
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>剣闘獣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>グラディアルビースト</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ギステル
desc: At the end of the Battle Phase, if this card battled: You can shuffle this card into the Deck; Special Summon 1 "Gladiator Beast" monster from your Deck, except "Gladiator Beast Gistel". You can only use each of the following effects of "Gladiator Beast Gistel" once per turn. You can reveal this card and 1 "Gladiator Beast" monster in your hand; Special Summon both. If this card is Special Summoned by the effect of a "Gladiator Beast" monster: You can add 1 "Gladiator" Spell/Trap from your Deck to your hand.
mnst_eff: At the end of the Battle Phase, if this card battled: You can shuffle this card into the Deck; Special Summon 1 "Gladiator Beast" monster from your Deck, except "Gladiator Beast Gistel". You can only use each of the following effects of "Gladiator Beast Gistel" once per turn. You can reveal this card and 1 "Gladiator Beast" monster in your hand; Special Summon both. If this card is Special Summoned by the effect of a "Gladiator Beast" monster: You can add 1 "Gladiator" Spell/Trap from your Deck to your hand.

action: Returns itself from field to Deck for cost
Reveals itself in the hand for cost
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
misc: At the end of the Battle Phase
